subject: Suggested CodeAI Directory listing: Ralph Workflow
why_this_action: The current audit says to stop spending cycles on more low-intent directory bursts and instead use a higher-intent conversion-moving lane.
CodeAI Directory is a directly relevant coding-tools discovery surface, and its public submit form was already proven broken by a real remote mail-delivery error earlier on 2026-05-23.
Direct curator fallback turns a blocked submit surface into a live contact attempt without generating another same-family batch or another internal-only packet.
expected_outcome: Convert a broken public submit surface into a real listing conversation on a high-intent AI coding tools directory that can route qualified traffic to Codeberg first.
replacement_condition: If there is no reply or live listing by the listing review checkpoint, treat CodeAI Directory as curator-contacted but still blocked, and move the next fresh action to another high-intent coding-tool discovery surface instead of retrying the broken form.

runtime_fix.source_issue: CodeAI Directory public submit form returned a remote Resend testing-domain error during direct POST attempt.
runtime_fix.same_run_repair: Used direct curator fallback email to the listed CodeAI Directory contact instead of waiting for the broken form to recover.
